title: Blog Update: Fresh Insights and Clarity

topics.title: Timeline Chart Enhancements
topics.summary: A new feature was added to the timeline chart, allowing users to toggle the display of stable versions. This enhancement improves user experience by enabling better filtering of version data.

topics.title: Blog Post Updates
topics.summary: Recent merges include updates to blog post descriptions and the addition of a new blog post about the latest project release. These changes aim to enhance content clarity and provide insights into major project updates for the community.

topics.title: Open Graph Image Logic Fix
topics.summary: A fix was merged to address issues with Open Graph image definitions. The update ensures that blog pages correctly utilize their designated images, improving social media sharing and visibility.

topics.title: User Feedback and Feature Requests
topics.summary: User feedback has led to the identification of a need for filtering capabilities on the timeline. This input is crucial for guiding future development and ensuring the platform meets user needs.

topics.title: Community Engagement
topics.summary: A post celebrating 100 days of npmx was shared on Bluesky, highlighting community engagement and ongoing development efforts. This initiative fosters a sense of community and encourages user participation.
